mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT f.function_id AS functionId, f.function_pid AS functionPid, f.name, f.sort FROM sys_role_function rf LEFT JOIN sys_function f ON rf.function_id = f.function_id WHERE rf.role_id = #{roleId} order by f.sort ASC

SELECT DISTINCT f.menu_id AS menuId, f.name, f.own_func As fuctionId FROM sys_role_menu rf LEFT JOIN sys_menu f ON rf.menu_id = f.menu_id LEFT JOIN sys_function sf ON f.own_func = sf.function_id WHERE rf.role_id = #{roleId}
mapper.insert: insert into sys_menu(name, perms, own_func, note ) values (#{name},#{perms},#{fuctionId},#{note})
mapper.select: select function_id, function_pid AS functionPid, name, sort from sys_function order by sort asc
SELECT DISTINCT menu_id, name, own_func As fuctionId FROM sys_menu
SELECT t2.function_id functionId, t2.role_id roleId FROM sys_user_role AS t1 LEFT JOIN sys_role_function AS t2 ON t1.role_id = t2.role_id WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT DISTINCT t3.function_id functionId, t3.function_pid functionPid, t3.name treeName, t3.kanban_name kanbanName, t3.sort sort, t3.data_type FROM sys_user_role AS t1 LEFT JOIN sys_role_function AS t2 ON t1.role_id = t2.role_id LEFT JOIN sys_function AS t3 ON t3.function_id = t2.function_id WHERE t1.user_id = #{userId} and t3.function_id is not null order by t3.sort asc,t3.function_id desc

SELECT DISTINCT t3.function_id functionId, t3.function_pid functionPid, t3.name treeName, t3.kanban_name kanbanName, t3.sort sort, t3.data_type FROM sys_user_role AS t1 LEFT JOIN sys_role_function AS t2 ON t1.role_id = t2.role_id LEFT JOIN sys_function AS t3 ON t3.function_id = t2.function_id WHERE t1.role_id = #{roleId} and t3.function_id is not null order by t3.sort asc,t3.function_id desc
